items.title: Compact Empty State
items.description: The empty item view now fits smaller detail layouts without overflowing.

items.title: Stable Smoke Test
items.description: The app smoke test now waits for the lists screen to finish rendering before checking labels.

items.title: CI Follow-up
items.description: This patch addresses the remaining widget-test failures from the UI refresh.

items.title: No Behavior Change
items.description: List data, sharing, and sync behavior are unchanged.
